prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约7981名→8737名→8027名→6770名→7175名，整体呈波动走势。2024年大幅前移至6770名后，2025年回弹至7175名，近两年波动幅度约405名，2025年基准位次约7175名；本省物理类计划2021年728人、2022年728人、2023年720人、2024年712人、2025年725人；2026年计划729人，较2025年小幅扩招4人（+0.55%），扩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第38名，近年稳定在36–39名区间，属全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议，无重大负面舆情；2025年曾有实习安全事故报道（偏负面），但已逐步平息；抖音热度排名第82位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；控制科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A-、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、冶金工程A；其中控制、计算机、软件等与招生专业高度关联，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等东北大学核心招生专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会关注度维持高位；本省2026年高考总人数约20万人，物理类按近年占比约71.8%估算约14.36万人，与2025年物理类14.34万人基本持平；省控线2025年物理类本科批367分、特殊类型515分，近年波动不大；东北大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，是本省唯一一所985理工类高校（另大连理工大学亦在辽宁），对本省考生有天然的地缘吸引力；2025年本省物理类招生725人，占当年物理类考生总数约0.51%，占比稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7175名、2026年计划小幅扩招0.55%、本省考生规模基本持平、计算机/自动化等优势专业持续高热、学校声誉中性偏稳等因素，预计2026年竞争略有加剧，位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约7169名，区间6669–7669名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7981 → 8737 → 8027 → 6770 → 7175, showing a fluctuating trend. After a significant advance to 6770 in 2024, it rebounded to 7175 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 405 in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 7175. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 728 in 2021, 728 in 2022, 720 in 2023, 712 in 2024, and 725 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 729, a slight increase of 4 (+0.55%) compared to 2025, which has a minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks approximately 38th, stable in the 36–39 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming dispute of the Qinhuangdao campus, with no major negative public opinion. In 2025, there was a report of an internship safety incident (somewhat negative), but it has gradually subsided. Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as 'average,' with low attention on short video platforms and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. Control Science and Engineering is A+ (national top), Computer Science and Technology is A, Software Engineering is A-, Mechanical Engineering is A-, Materials Science and Engineering is A-, and Metallurgical Engineering is A. Among them, Control, Computer, and Software are highly related to enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors at Northeastern University, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, maintaining high social attention. The total number of provincial college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 143,600 based on the recent proportion of approximately 71.8%, roughly the same as the 143,400 in 2025. The provincial control line for Physics Category in 2025 was 367 for undergraduate batch and 515 for special types, with little fluctuation in recent years. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, and is the only 985 science and engineering university in the province (Dalian University of Technology is also in Liaoning), naturally attracting local candidates. In 2025, the provincial Physics Category enrollment was 725, accounting for about 0.51% of the total Physics Category candidates, a stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7175, a slight enrollment expansion of 0.55% in 2026, roughly stable provincial candidate numbers, continued high popularity of advantageous majors like Computer Science and Automation, and a neutral to stable school reputation, competition is expected to intensify slightly in 2026, with rankings moving forward modestly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7169, with a range of 6669–7669.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 7169, with a range of 6669–7669. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 6669) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence Future Technology College, Computer Science and Technology). Those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 7000–7300) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors with moderate sprinting for Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper end of the range (around 7669) are advised to focus on stable Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as a safety net. Northeastern University's A-class disciplines such as Control and Computer Science have outstanding strength, and related majors offer broad employment prospects, making them worth prioritizing.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第38名，属全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第82位，评价为"一般"，未出现明显报考热度异常；东北大学以工科见长，文科类招生专业（公共管理类、外国语言文学类、人文科学试验班）对应的学科评估中，外国语言文学、公共管理等未进入A类评级，文科整体学科实力相对工科偏弱。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1643名、2026年招生计划持平、本省历史类考生规模基本稳定、文科专业热度分化（法学偏热但外语一般）、学校声誉中性等因素，预计2026年位次在1643名附近小幅波动。考虑到近年位次在1643–1785区间波动且2025年处于区间低位，预计2026年位次略有后移。预测最低位次约1663名，区间1414–1912名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1221 → 1413 → 1785 → 1740 → 1643, showing an overall trend of first declining and then stabilizing. Rankings continuously moved backward from 2021 to 2023 (from 1221 to 1785), slightly recovered to 1643 in 2024–2025, with a baseline ranking of about 1643 in 2025. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 15 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 19 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 19, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked approximately 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it among the top universities nationwide. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as 'average,' with no significant abnormal application heat. Northeastern University is known for engineering, and its liberal arts majors (Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, Humanities Experimental Class) have corresponding discipline evaluations where Foreign Languages and Literature and Public Administration have not entered the A-level rating. Overall, the strength of liberal arts disciplines is relatively weaker compared to engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (Public Administration includes Law direction) has a social popularity rating of 'slightly hot, recommended,' while Foreign Languages and Literature is rated 'average, wait and see.' In 2026, the number of provincial History Category examinees is estimated at about 56,400 based on a recent proportion of approximately 28.2%, roughly the same as the 56,300 in 2025. The provincial control line for History Category in 2025 was 437 for undergraduate batch and 522 for special types, with a steady upward trend in recent years. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, offering geographical appeal to local History Category examinees. In 2025, only 19 History Category students were enrolled in the province, an extremely small scale, making ranking fluctuations highly sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1643, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the basically stable number of provincial History Category examinees, the divergence in liberal arts major popularity (Law slightly hot but Foreign Languages average), and the neutral school reputation, the 2026 ranking is expected to fluctuate slightly around 1643. Given that recent rankings have fluctuated in the 1643–1785 range and 2025 is at the lower end of this range, the 2026 ranking is expected to move slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1663, with a range of 1414–1912.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1663, range 1414–1912. Northeastern University enrolls only 19 History Category students in Liaoning Province, offering limited major choices. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 1414) can aim for Humanities Experimental Class or Public Administration; those in the middle range (about 1600–1700) are advised to focus on Public Administration; those near the upper end (around 1912) may consider Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option. Note that Northeastern University has few liberal arts majors, so carefully assess major fit before applying.
